action_set_definitions.name: get_current_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current real-time state of the treatment facility, including nutrient levels, pH, sludge height, and energy usage.

action_set_definitions.name: get_safety_constraints
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the hard equipment limits and safety thresholds to prevent hardware damage or process failure.

action_set_definitions.name: set_aeration_intensity
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power output of the aeration system. High power increases oxygen for COD/Nitrogen removal but consumes more energy.

power_kw.description: The target blower power in kilowatts. Must not exceed max_aeration_kw.

action_set_definitions.name: set_ph_reagent_dosing
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the dosing rate of caustic chemicals to increase pH levels for Boron compliance.

rate_lph.description: Dosing rate in liters per hour. Must not exceed max_dosing_lph.

action_set_definitions.name: set_sludge_extraction_rate
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the rate of sludge removal from the secondary clarifier to manage the sludge blanket height.

flow_m3h.description: Waste sludge flow rate in cubic meters per hour.

state_description.dissolved_oxygen_mg_l: The concentration of oxygen dissolved in the aeration tank.
state_description.influent_flow_rate_m3_h: The rate at which wastewater enters the system.
state_description.ph_level: The acidity or alkalinity of the wastewater.
state_description.cod_outlet_mg_l: Chemical Oxygen Demand at the outlet, indicating water purity.
state_description.sludge_blanket_height_m: The depth of the accumulated sludge in the secondary clarifier.
state_description.total_nitrogen_mg_l: Total nitrogen concentration in the treated water.
state_description.energy_consumption_kwh: Cumulative energy consumed by pumps and aerators.
state_description.microbial_activity_index: A normalized value (0-1) representing the health of the activated sludge biomass.
